name: stepper
description: Step progress indicator block for multi-step flows.

props.name: steps
props.description: Array of steps to display. Each step has a label, optional description (vertical orientation only), and optional id for stable reconciliation.

props.name: currentStep
props.description: Zero-based index of the currently active step. Steps before this index are marked as completed.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout orientation. Horizontal arranges steps in a row; vertical stacks them with descriptions visible.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier forwarded to the outermost container.
